title: Particle Constellation Universe
description: An interactive cosmic particle field where constellations emerge from chaos. Move to bend gravity, click to detonate a supernova shockwave.
concept: Inspired by NASA deep-field photography and generative art. 180 particles drift like distant stars, forming temporary constellations when they approach each other. Your cursor acts as a gravitational anomaly pulling particles toward it, while clicks trigger expanding shockwave rings that blast particles apart like a supernova.

interaction.mousemove: Creates gravitational attraction — particles drift toward cursor
interaction.click: Detonates an expanding shockwave that repels all nearby particles
interaction.touch: Full mobile support — drag to attract, tap to detonate
